BearerAuth.description: Access token obtained from /oauth/token. Pass as Authorization: Bearer {token}

BasicAuth.description: Pass your client ID as the username and your client secret as the password. These are used only to obtain a bearer token from /oauth/token.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden - valid token but insufficient permissions

NotFound.description: Not Found - the requested resource does not exist

BadRequest.description: Bad Request - malformed request syntax or invalid parameters

Conflict.description: Conflict - the request conflicts with the current state of the resource

UnprocessableEntity.description: Unprocessable Entity - the request was well-formed but contains semantic errors

TooManyRequests.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

id.description: The unique identifier for the payroll code

payRollProvider.description: The name of the payroll provider this code belongs to

nextPage.description: URL or cursor for the next page. Empty string if there is no next page.

pageSize.description: The number of records per page

previousPage.description: URL or cursor for the previous page. Empty string if there is no previous page.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages available

totalRecords.description: The total number of records across all pages

id.description: The unique identifier for this timesheet detail entry

activity.description: The ID of the activity associated with this detail entry

alternateDepartment.description: An alternate department for this entry. Empty string if not set.

alternateOrganisation.description: An alternate organisation for this entry. Empty string if not set.

finishTime.description: The finish time of this detail entry in ISO 8601 format

hours.description: The number of hours for this detail entry

mealBreak.description: Whether this entry includes a meal break

restBreak.description: Whether this entry includes a rest break

startTime.description: The start time of this detail entry in ISO 8601 format

id.description: The unique identifier for the timesheet

approvedHours.description: The number of approved hours. Null if not yet approved.

approvedPayroll.description: The approved payroll reference. Null if not yet approved.

casualJob.description: Whether this timesheet is for a casual job

clockIn.description: The clock-in time in ISO 8601 format. Null if not clocked in.

clockOut.description: The clock-out time in ISO 8601 format. Null if not clocked out.

contractedHoursId.description: The ID of the contracted hours entry this timesheet was generated from

date.description: The date of the timesheet in YYYY-MM-DD format

details.description: A list of detail entries breaking down the timesheet into activity segments

employeeId.description: The ID of the employee this timesheet belongs to

finishTime.description: The overall finish time of the timesheet in ISO 8601 format

hoursToPay.description: The total payable hours for this timesheet

includesLeave.description: Whether this timesheet includes any leave

organisationPayRollId.description: The ID of the organisation responsible for payroll

organisationWorkedId.description: The ID of the organisation where the work was performed

processed.description: The date/time the timesheet was processed for payroll. Null if not yet processed.

shift.description: The shift template applied to this timesheet. Null if not shift-based.

startTime.description: The overall start time of the timesheet in ISO 8601 format

id.description: The unique identifier for the pay period

calendar.description: The name of the pay calendar this period belongs to

closed.description: The date the pay period was closed, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Null if not yet closed.

finishDate.description: The end date of the pay period in YYYY-MM-DD format

hours.description: Total hours worked in this pay period

numberEmployees.description: The number of employees with timesheets in this pay period

numberTimesheets.description: The total number of timesheets in this pay period

payRollCompanyId.description: The payroll company identifier. Empty string if not assigned.

payRollProvider.description: The name of the payroll provider for this pay period

startDate.description: The start date of the pay period in YYYY-MM-DD format

id.description: The unique identifier for the shift

code.description: A short code for the shift

finishTime.description: The shift finish time in HH:MM format

name.description: The display name of the shift

startTime.description: The shift start time in HH:MM format

id.description: The unique identifier for the organisation

departments.description: A list of departments within this organisation

name.description: The display name of the organisation

roles.description: A list of all roles available across this organisation

shifts.description: A list of shift templates defined for this organisation

workDayFinishTime.description: The default work day finish time for the organisation in HH:MM format

workDayStartTime.description: The default work day start time for the organisation in HH:MM format

id.description: The unique identifier for the address. Empty string if not assigned.

country.description: Country. Empty string if not assigned.

line2.description: Second line of the address. Empty string if not assigned.

suburb.description: Suburb. Empty string if not assigned.

ContractedHoursDepartment.description: A minimal department reference used within contracted hours

id.description: The unique identifier of the department

name.description: The display name of the department

ContractedHoursRole.description: A minimal role reference used within contracted hours

id.description: The unique identifier of the role

name.description: The display name of the role

ContractedHoursShift.description: A minimal shift reference used within contracted hours

id.description: The unique identifier of the shift

name.description: The display name of the shift

id.description: The unique identifier for this contracted hours entry

day.description: The day of the week (1 = Monday, 7 = Sunday)

finishTime.description: The finish time of the contracted shift in T HH:MM:SS.mmm format. Null if defined by a shift template.

minutesTotal.description: Total duration of the shift in minutes, including breaks

minutesWorking.description: Working duration of the shift in minutes, excluding unpaid breaks

shift.description: The shift template applied to this entry. Null if start/finish times are set explicitly.

startTime.description: The start time of the contracted shift in T HH:MM:SS.mmm format. Null if defined by a shift template.

week.description: The week number within the pay cycle this entry applies to

workPattern.description: Whether this entry is part of a work pattern

id.description: The unique identifier for the employee

contractedHours.description: A list of the employee's contracted hours entries across the week

payRollCode.description: The payroll code associated with this employee. Empty string if not assigned.

id.description: The unique identifier for the role

costCentreCode.description: The cost centre code associated with this role. Empty string if not assigned.

defaultActivity.description: The ID of the default activity assigned to this role

name.description: The display name of the role

id.description: The unique identifier for the department

costCentreCode.description: The cost centre code associated with this department. Empty string if not assigned.

manager.description: The manager of the department. Empty string if not assigned.

name.description: The display name of the department

payRollCode.description: The payroll code associated with this department. Empty string if not assigned.

roles.description: A list of roles within this department

workDayFinishTime.description: The default work day finish time for this department. Empty string if not set.

workDayStartTime.description: The default work day start time for this department. Empty string if not set.

id.description: The unique identifier for the activity

costCentre.description: The cost centre associated with the activity. Empty string if not assigned.

isBreak.description: Whether this activity is classified as a break

name.description: The display name of the activity

payRollCodes.description: A list of payroll codes associated with this activity

post.description: Exchanges your client ID and secret for an access token.

grant_type.description: The type of grant being requested. Must always be client_credentials.

access_token.description: The bearer token to use in subsequent API requests

expires_in.description: Seconds until the token expires. This will always be 3600.

refresh_token.description: Token that can be used to refresh the session

token_type.description: The token type. Will always be Bearer.

post.summary: Check if a token is valid
post.description: Checks if an access token is valid.

get.description: Returns a list of all the activities in your organisation.
Returns details about a single activity by its ID.

parameters.name: activity_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the activity to retrieve

get.description: Returns a list of all the departments in your organisation.
Returns details about a single department by its ID.

parameters.name: department_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the department to retrieve

get.description: Returns a list of all the employees in your organisation.
Returns details about a single employee by their ID.

parameters.name: employee_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the employee to retrieve

get.description: Returns a list of all the organisations under your head office. Returns only your organisation if you don't have any organisations under yours.

parameters.name: organisation_ID
parameters.description: Returns a specific organisation under your head office by its organisation ID.

get.description: Returns a list of all the pay periods/calendars in your organisation.
Returns details about a single pay period by its ID.

parameters.name: payperiod_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the pay period to retrieve

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all the timesheets in your organisation.

data.description: The list of timesheets for the current page

get.description: Returns details about a single timesheet by its ID.

parameters.name: timesheet_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the timesheet to retrieve

get.description: For testing. Returns your organisation name if set up correctly.

200.description: Returns the organisation name as a plain string
